'''pahate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:zippingly|zippingly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-h-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zippingly|zippingly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| pahate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:pahate|pahate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:pahatesher|pahatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pahatesherĂ«m|pahatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pahatero|pahatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:pahateshĂ«|pahateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pahateshĂ«m|pahateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipahatero|gokipahatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipahateshĂ«|gokipahateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipahateshĂ«m|gokipahateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gopahankerom|gopahankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopahankeshĂ«|gopahankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopahankeshĂ«m|gopahankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gopahankeya|gopahankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pahaterom|pahaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pahatemu|pahatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:pahateya|pahateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipahaterom|gokipahaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipahatemu|gokipahatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokipahateya|gokipahateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:pahahate|pahahate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:pahahatesher|pahahatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pahahatesherĂ«m|pahahatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pahahatero|pahahatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:pahahateshĂ«|pahahateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pahahateshĂ«m|pahahateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipahahatero|gokipahahatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipahahateshĂ«|gokipahahateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipahahateshĂ«m|gokipahahateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gopahahankerom|gopahahankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopahahankeshĂ«|gopahahankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopahahankeshĂ«m|gopahahankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gopahahankeya|gopahahankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pahahaterom|pahahaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pahahatemu|pahahatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:pahahateya|pahahateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipahahaterom|gokipahahaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipahahatemu|gokipahahatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokipahahateya|gokipahahateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:pĂŠhĂŠte|pĂŠhĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:pĂŠhĂŠtesher|pĂŠhĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pĂŠhĂŠtesherĂ«m|pĂŠhĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pĂŠhĂŠtero|pĂŠhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:pĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«|pĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«m|pĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipĂŠhĂŠtero|gokipĂŠhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«|gokipĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«m|gokipĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gopĂŠhĂŠnkerom|gopĂŠhĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopĂŠhĂŠnkeshĂ«|gopĂŠhĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopĂŠhĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gopĂŠhĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gopĂŠhĂŠnkeya|gopĂŠhĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pĂŠhĂŠterom|pĂŠhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pĂŠhĂŠtemu|pĂŠhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:pĂŠhĂŠteya|pĂŠhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipĂŠhĂŠterom|gokipĂŠhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipĂŠhĂŠtemu|gokipĂŠhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokipĂŠhĂŠteya|gokipĂŠhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:pafhafte|pafhafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:pafhaftesher|pafhaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pafhaftesherĂ«m|pafhaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pafhaftero|pafhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:pafhafteshĂ«|pafhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pafhafteshĂ«m|pafhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipafhaftero|gokipafhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipafhafteshĂ«|gokipafhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipafhafteshĂ«m|gokipafhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gopafhafnkerom|gopafhafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopafhafnkeshĂ«|gopafhafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopafhafnkeshĂ«m|gopafhafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gopafhafnkeya|gopafhafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pafhafterom|pafhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pafhaftemu|pafhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:pafhafteya|pafhafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipafhafterom|gokipafhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipafhaftemu|gokipafhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokipafhafteya|gokipafhafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
